name: Blueberry Torte
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Pillsbury's BEST all-purpose Flour or unbleached Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour a 9-10 inch springform pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Add lemon peel and egg; mix for 2 minutes at medium speed.
4. Gradually add flour mixture to the butter mixture, alternating with sour cream, mixing well after each addition.
5. Pour batter into prepared pan, spreading it evenly and ensuring it reaches at least 1/4 inch up the sides.
6. In a separate bowl, mix blueberries with 2 tablespoons sugar and 1 teaspoon flour. Spoon this over the batter.
7. Bake for 45-55 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Let cool slightly.
8. Remove the pan sides. In a small bowl, whisk powdered sugar with enough milk to reach desired drizzling consistency.
9. Drizzle glaze over the warm cake and serve at room temperature or chilled. Makes 8 servings.
